Uses of Class
org.key_project.util.collection.Pair

Packages that use Pair
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.predicateabstraction
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.mergerule
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.mergerule.predicateabstraction
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.smt
This package contains the graphical user interface of the SMT backend.
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.builder
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof
This package contains the core data structures of proofs, nodes, goals, as well as machinery to deal with these data structures.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.intermediate
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt
This package contains classes for proof environments and proof management.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml
This package provides the functionalities of parsing JML comments into KeY constructs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util
This package is a grab bag of miscellaneous useful code fragments.
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.wd
 
org.key_project.slicing
 
org.key_project.slicing.graph

    abstract ImmutableSet<Pair<Sort,IObserverFunction>>
    ClassAxiom.getUsedObservers(Services services)

  • Uses of Pair in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule

    Subclasses of Pair in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SymbolicExecutionState
    A symbolic execution state is a pair of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, and a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula.
    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule that return Pair
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Pair<SymbolicExecutionState,SymbolicExecutionState>
    MergeRuleUtils.handleNameClashes(SymbolicExecutionState mergeState, SymbolicExecutionState mergePartnerState, Services services)
    Due to the introduction of local namespaces, we run into trouble when applying state merging in the presence of locally introduced symbols.
    static Pair<Sort,Name>
    MergeRuleUtils.parsePlaceholder(String input, boolean registerInNamespaces, Services services)
    Parses a declaration of the type "<SORT> <NAME>", where <SORT> must be a sort known to the proof and <NAME> must be a fresh name.
    static Pair<Sort,Name>
    MergeRuleUtils.parsePlaceholder(String input, Services services)
    Parses a declaration of the type "<SORT> <NAME>", where <SORT> must be a sort known to the proof and <NAME> must be a fresh name.
    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule that return types with arguments of type Pair
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Optional<Pair<JTerm,JTerm>>
    MergeRuleUtils.getDistinguishingFormula(JTerm pathCondition1, JTerm pathCondition2, Services services)
    Computes a formula that implies pathCondition1 and, if pathCondition1 and pathCondition2 are contradicting, does not imply pathCondition2.
    static Optional<Pair<JTerm,JTerm>>
    MergeRuleUtils.getDistinguishingFormula(ArrayList<JTerm> conjElemsPathCond1, ArrayList<JTerm> conjElemsPathCond2, Services services)
